events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday, marking another year in the life of the legendary Beatles drummer, who is now 86 years old.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, we're celebrating the life and career of the Beatles legend, who is now 86 years old.

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago

angles.name: MTV Milestone
angles.copy: MTV launched 45 years ago with the Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star', a moment that changed music television forever.

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: The Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a moment that defined a generation and changed music forever.

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis Presley's death, a legendary musician who left an indelible mark on the music world.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: We remember Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his death, a musician who would have been 91 years old, and whose legacy continues to inspire new generations.

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road 57 Years Ago
